package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// scenario for context_not_first_parameter: Functions that accept context.Context but not as the first non-receiver parameter on context-aware call paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: context; severity: info.
func scenario237Negative(ctx context.Context, client *http.Client, url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	child, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(child, http.MethodGet, url, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return client.Do(req)
}
